title: Renormalization
summary: Aggregate entry point for Laurent/log expansions, finite parts, cutoff functionals, volume, and curvature integrals.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Aggregate entry point for Laurent/log expansions, finite parts, cutoff functionals, volume, and curvature integrals.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows Ambient/PE/Renormalization.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

references.locator: Proposition 3.7, Proposition 3.10, Lemma 4.1, and Theorems 1.1/1.4 as applicable
references.note: Primary source for the renormalized-curvature-integral mechanism represented by these modules.

limitations: This file establishes syntax, aggregate imports, or an abstract bridge. It must not be read as a derivation of the corresponding geometric theorem from concrete tensor and analytic data.
